name: Tenda 2K WiFi 6 Indoor PT Camera
description:
This indoor security camera delivers clear monitoring with a 3 MP sensor and 2K video quality. It uses AI human detection to help identify activity and provides real-time alerts for home observation.

The camera supports WiFi 6 connectivity, one-touch calling, PT movement, 10X digital zoom, and TF card storage. It is designed for convenient remote viewing and everyday indoor security needs.

name: Xiaomi Smart Camera 2K Indoor Security Camera
description:
This Xiaomi indoor security camera provides 2K video quality with a 360° panoramic view for flexible home monitoring. It connects with the Mi Home app and supports clear viewing in different lighting conditions.

The camera includes AI human detection, two-way voice calls, H.265 video encoding, and multiple storage options. Its compact design makes it suitable for home, office, and indoor security use.

name: Runpu NDI PTZ AI Tracking Camera
description:
Runpu NDI PTZ Camera is designed for video conferencing, streaming, and professional indoor setups. It provides 1080P Full HD video output with a Sony CMOS sensor and flexible connection options.

The camera features AI smart tracking, optical zoom, pan movement, and PoE support. It works with Windows and macOS systems for different professional video applications.

name: SHIWOJIA 36X Zoom Solar Security Camera
description:
This outdoor solar security camera provides long-distance monitoring with high-resolution video and 36X optical zoom. It supports 4G SIM and WiFi connections for flexible outdoor installation.

The camera includes solar charging, rechargeable battery power, PIR human detection, night vision, and remote app access. It is suitable for monitoring outdoor areas such as yards, entrances, and properties.

name: KERUI Fingerprint Lock
description:
KERUI Fingerprint Lock provides keyless access with fingerprint recognition and a rechargeable lithium battery. Its compact design makes it suitable for personal storage, travel, and everyday security needs.

The lock features USB charging support, a zinc alloy body, and IP67 waterproof protection. It works without traditional keys or passwords and offers a convenient smart locking solution.

name: RAYKUBE V1 Bluetooth Fingerprint Smart Lock
description:
RAYKUBE V1 Smart Lock provides multiple unlocking options including fingerprint, password, RFID card, app control, and mechanical key access. It is designed for different door types with a durable aluminium alloy body.

The lock uses Bluetooth technology and supports smart access control through connected devices. Its compact design provides convenient security options for modern homes and offices.

name: RAYKUBE K20 Biometric Smart Door Lock
description:
RAYKUBE K20 Smart Door Lock supports fingerprint, password, IC card, mechanical key, and app-based unlocking methods. It is designed with a zinc alloy body and supports smart home integration.

The lock offers Bluetooth connectivity, gateway support, and reversible handle direction. It is suitable for various door types and provides flexible access control options.

name: RAYKUBE L31 Smart Fingerprint Door Lock
description:
RAYKUBE L31 Smart Door Lock provides multiple access methods including fingerprint, NFC, IC card, mechanical key, and app control. It supports Tuya Smart Home Platform with Bluetooth connectivity.

The lock features an aluminium alloy body, gateway support, and reversible handle direction. It is designed for different door materials and modern smart home security setups.

name: 3 Pack Outdoor Solar Motion Sensor Lights
description:
These outdoor solar lights are designed for entrances, gardens, garages, and outdoor areas. They use solar power with LED lighting and motion sensor technology for automatic operation.

The lights feature a rechargeable battery, durable ABS body, and easy installation design. They provide a convenient lighting solution for improving visibility around outdoor spaces.

name: Neon RGB LED Strip Light
description:
This flexible neon RGB LED strip light is designed for gaming rooms, bedrooms, and decorative lighting setups. It supports multiple colors and lighting effects through remote and app control.

The strip uses modern LED technology with a flexible design and waterproof construction. It helps create customized lighting environments for homes, entertainment spaces, and creative projects.

name: 220V COB LED Strip Light
description:
This COB LED strip light provides bright and flexible lighting for homes, kitchens, outdoor areas, and creative decoration projects. It uses COB LED technology for a smooth lighting effect.

The strip features waterproof protection, dimmable lighting support, and flexible installation options. It can be adjusted for different spaces while providing long-lasting illumination.

name: GUHUAVMI ET571 Health Monitoring Smartwatch
description:
This smartwatch features a large AMOLED display with smart functions for Android and iOS users. It supports Bluetooth calling, voice assistant features, sports tracking, and daily activity monitoring.

The watch includes health tracking tools, multiple sports modes, notifications, weather updates, music control, and other practical features. Its modern design makes it suitable for everyday wearable use.

name: Ultra 2 AMOLED Smart Watch
description:
This smartwatch features an AMOLED touchscreen display with a stylish design and support for Android and iOS devices. It includes Bluetooth calling, built-in GPS, and customizable watch faces.

The watch provides activity tracking, sports modes, smart notifications, music control, and daily tools. It is designed for users looking for a modern wearable with smart features.

name: ECG Health Analysis Smart Watch
description:
This smartwatch features an AMOLED display with ECG and PPG-based health tracking functions. It supports Android and iOS devices with Bluetooth calling and smart app connectivity.

The device includes activity tracking, sleep monitoring, message notifications, wireless charging, and customizable watch faces. It combines smart features with a modern wearable design for daily use.

name: Women AMOLED ECG Smart Watch
description:
This smartwatch features a round AMOLED display with smart health and activity tracking functions. It supports Android and iOS devices with Bluetooth calling and customizable watch faces.

The watch includes sports tracking, sleep monitoring, stress tracking, notifications, music control, and daily utility tools. Its stylish design makes it suitable for everyday wearable use.

name: Ultra Thin AMOLED Smart Watch
description:
This ultra-thin smartwatch features a large AMOLED touch display with always-on display support. It works with Android and iOS devices and provides Bluetooth calling with AI voice assistant features.

The watch includes health tracking, sports modes, smart notifications, music control, weather updates, and NFC functions. Its slim design provides a comfortable experience for everyday wear.

name: OnePlus Solar Fast Charging Power Bank
description:
This portable power bank features a high-capacity battery with built-in charging cables and a digital display for checking remaining power. It supports solar charging and works with various USB-compatible devices.

The power bank provides fast charging support, multiple output options, LED flashlight functionality, and a portable design. It is suitable for travel, outdoor activities, and everyday charging needs.

name: KUULAA Qi2 Magnetic Power Bank 10000mAh
description:
This portable power bank features a 10000mAh battery with Qi2 magnetic wireless charging support for compatible devices. It includes USB Type-C connectivity and a durable metal shell design.

The device supports 20W PD fast charging, two-way charging technology, battery status display, and a built-in LED lamp. It provides a convenient charging solution for daily mobile use.

name: Baseus 30000mAh 65W Fast Charging Power Bank
description:
This Baseus power bank features a 30000mAh battery capacity and supports fast charging for smartphones, tablets, and compatible laptops. It includes a digital display to show the remaining battery level.

The device supports USB Type-C PD charging, multiple ports, and two-way charging technology. Its portable design makes it useful for travel, work, and everyday device charging.

name: Mini 50000mAh Fast Charging Power Bank
description:
This portable power bank features a large 50000mAh battery with built-in charging cables and a digital display. It supports fast charging for smartphones and other compatible USB devices.

The device includes an integrated stand, safety protection system, and convenient portable design. It is suitable for users who need extended battery capacity during travel and daily activities.

name: Baseus 30000mAh 65W Power Bank
description:
This Baseus portable power bank provides a 30000mAh battery capacity with 65W USB Type-C PD fast charging support. It is designed for charging smartphones, tablets, laptops, and other compatible devices.

The power bank includes a digital display, multiple USB outputs, and two-way charging technology. Its compact design provides a practical charging option for home, office, and travel use.

name: QOOVI 50000mAh 100W Power Bank
description:
This QOOVI power bank features a 50000mAh battery and supports up to 100W fast charging for laptops, smartphones, and other compatible devices. It includes a TFT digital display and built-in cable.

The device supports USB Type-C input, dual USB outputs, and two-way charging technology. It provides a high-capacity charging solution for multiple devices.

name: KUULAA Qi2 Magnetic 10000mAh Power Bank
description:
This KUULAA power bank features a 10000mAh battery with Qi2 magnetic wireless charging and 20W PD fast charging support. It is designed for compatible smartphones and mobile devices.

The device includes USB Type-C charging, LED status indicator, built-in LED lamp, and a durable metal shell. It provides a compact charging solution for everyday use.

name: 200000mAh 120W Solar Power Bank
description:
This high-capacity power bank features a 200000mAh battery with up to 120W charging support for multiple USB-powered devices. It includes USB Type-C and dual USB output options.

The device comes with an LED digital display for battery monitoring and supports various smartphones, tablets, and USB-compatible devices. Its portable design makes it suitable for outdoor and emergency charging needs.
